_about: Curated starter recipes for forge engine render. Invoke with: forge engine render --recipe <id>. Each recipe is a tested combination of engine + subject + config + seed that produces a coherent on-genre output. You can override --subject, --config, or --seed on the CLI to remix any recipe.
_format: Each entry: {engine, description, subject, config (dot.notation knob=value pairs), seed}

noir-detective-alley.description: Classic 1940s detective lighting a cigarette under a streetlamp in a rainy alley. Sin City + Alton fingerprint.
noir-detective-alley.subject: lone detective in fedora and trench coat lighting a cigarette in a rain-soaked alley at midnight

noir-tech-tokyo-rooftop.description: Blade-Runner tech-noir: android assassin on a Tokyo rooftop, neon practicals + volumetric rain.
noir-tech-tokyo-rooftop.subject: android assassin in a long coat standing on a Tokyo high-rise rooftop, neon signs below

noir-nordic-investigation.description: Scandinavian noir: detective at a snow-covered crime scene, cold overcast light, breath visible.
noir-nordic-investigation.subject: detective in dark wool coat standing over a covered body at a snowy Stockholm bridge

noir-pulp-vigilante.description: Pure pulp ink-and-paper comic noir: vigilante in silhouette, blood-red accent, Mignola fingerprint.
noir-pulp-vigilante.subject: hooded vigilante crouched on a gargoyle ledge overlooking a city street

wildlife-snow-leopard-cliff.description: Snow leopard perched on a Himalayan cliff at sunrise. Vincent Munier register.
wildlife-snow-leopard-cliff.subject: snow leopard perched on a Himalayan cliff ledge at sunrise

wildlife-red-fox-snow.description: Red fox pausing in a snowy meadow, overcast documentary light. Lanting register.
wildlife-red-fox-snow.subject: red fox pausing in a snowy meadow at dawn, breath visible in the cold

wildlife-blue-jay-perch.description: Blue jay on a hawthorn branch, dappled forest light. Tim-Flach intimate framing.
wildlife-blue-jay-perch.subject: blue jay perched on a hawthorn branch with white flowers, springtime

wildlife-eagle-flight.description: Bald eagle mid-flight against a clear sky, super-telephoto reach.
wildlife-eagle-flight.subject: bald eagle in mid-flight wings fully extended, talons tucked

_about_bird_pose_series: Blue Jay and Red Finch pose-series recipes. Render with: forge engine render --recipe <id> --no-default-loras --steps 14 --out <path>. Each recipe pins species, pose, habitat, config, and seed for reproducible re-renders.

wildlife-blue-jay-pose-01-alert-perch.description: Blue Jay pose 1 of 4: same adult blue jay, alert side-profile perch with raised crest.
wildlife-blue-jay-pose-01-alert-perch.subject: same adult blue jay pose-series bird, alert side-profile perch on a mossy oak branch, crest raised, black necklace marking crisp, barred blue wings folded, long tail angled slightly downward, one eye sharply visible, identical plumage pattern across the series

wildlife-blue-jay-pose-02-landing.description: Blue Jay pose 2 of 4: same adult blue jay landing, wings open and feet reaching.
wildlife-blue-jay-pose-02-landing.subject: same adult blue jay pose-series bird landing on the same mossy oak branch, wings spread in a controlled braking pose, feet extended toward the bark, crest raised, black necklace marking crisp, barred blue wings visible, long tail fanned slightly, identical plumage pattern across the series

wildlife-blue-jay-pose-03-feeding.description: Blue Jay pose 3 of 4: same adult blue jay leaning down to feed on a berry.
wildlife-blue-jay-pose-03-feeding.subject: same adult blue jay pose-series bird leaning forward on the same mossy oak branch to pick a small berry with its beak, crest partly raised, black necklace marking crisp, barred blue wings folded, tail counterbalancing upward, one foot gripping bark, identical plumage pattern across the series

wildlife-blue-jay-pose-04-preening.description: Blue Jay pose 4 of 4: same adult blue jay preening wing feathers.
wildlife-blue-jay-pose-04-preening.subject: same adult blue jay pose-series bird in a clear preening pose on the same mossy oak branch, head turned backward and partly tucked into its lifted blue wing, beak visibly gripping one wing feather, wing lifted away from body, crest lowered slightly, black necklace marking crisp, barred blue wing detail visible, one foot tucked close to body, not an upright alert pose, identical plumage pattern across the series

wildlife-red-finch-pose-01-alert-perch.description: Red Finch pose 1 of 4: same male House Finch, alert perch with red head and breast.
wildlife-red-finch-pose-01-alert-perch.subject: same male House Finch red finch pose-series bird, alert side-profile perch on a thin garden twig, raspberry-red forehead throat and upper breast, brown-streaked wings folded, conical seed beak closed, tail angled slightly downward, one eye sharply visible, clean natural background corners with no signature no watermark no letters, identical plumage pattern across the series

wildlife-red-finch-pose-02-landing.description: Red Finch pose 2 of 4: same male House Finch landing with wings open.
wildlife-red-finch-pose-02-landing.subject: same male House Finch red finch pose-series bird landing on the same thin garden twig, wings spread in a braking pose, feet extended toward the twig, raspberry-red forehead throat and upper breast, brown-streaked wing feathers visible, conical seed beak closed, identical plumage pattern across the series

wildlife-red-finch-pose-03-feeding.description: Red Finch pose 3 of 4: same male House Finch feeding on seeds.
wildlife-red-finch-pose-03-feeding.subject: same male House Finch red finch pose-series bird leaning down on the same thin garden twig to pick one visible seed with its conical beak, raspberry-red forehead throat and upper breast, brown-streaked wings folded, tail lifted slightly for balance, identical plumage pattern across the series

wildlife-red-finch-pose-04-preening.description: Red Finch pose 4 of 4: same male House Finch preening shoulder feathers.
wildlife-red-finch-pose-04-preening.subject: same male House Finch red finch pose-series bird in a clear preening pose on the same thin garden twig, head turned backward and partly tucked into its shoulder, beak visibly combing brown-streaked shoulder feathers, one wing lifted slightly away from the body, raspberry-red forehead throat and upper breast, one foot tucked close to body, beak closed against feathers not singing, identical plumage pattern across the series

impressionist-starry-cypresses.subject: two flame-shaped cypress trees against a swirling starry night sky, wheatfield below, distant village

impressionist-sunflowers-arles.description: Van Gogh Arles period: vase of sunflowers, impasto-thick paint, chromatic complementary.
impressionist-sunflowers-arles.subject: a vase of sunflowers on a wooden table by a window, late summer afternoon

impressionist-monet-haystacks.description: Monet broken-color haystacks at dusk, high-key palette, optical color mixing.
impressionist-monet-haystacks.subject: two haystacks in a wheat field at dusk, long pink shadows on golden stubble

impressionist-cafe-night.description: Van Gogh Night Café — yellow gaslight against deep green walls, isolated patrons.
impressionist-cafe-night.subject: interior of a 1888 french café at night, gas lamp warm yellow glow, isolated patrons at tables

indian-krishna-yamuna-dawn.description: Krishna playing flute by the Yamuna at dawn, Ravi-Varma oleograph naturalism with attending gopis.
indian-krishna-yamuna-dawn.subject: Lord Krishna playing flute beside a lotus pond at dawn, gopis at the riverbank watching

indian-vishnu-cosmic.description: Vishnu reclining on Shesha in the cosmic ocean, Tanjore gold-leaf devotional panel.
indian-vishnu-cosmic.subject: Lord Vishnu reclining on the serpent Shesha in the cosmic ocean, lotus rising from his navel

indian-ganesha-temple.description: Ganesha seated in a stone temple interior, hieratic Tanjore composition with gold leaf.
indian-ganesha-temple.subject: Lord Ganesha seated on a lotus pedestal inside a stone temple, oil lamps glowing

indian-shiva-meditation.description: Shiva in dhyana meditation on Mount Kailash, Pahari miniature delicacy.
indian-shiva-meditation.subject: Lord Shiva seated in meditation on Mount Kailash with snow-capped peaks behind

coloring-toddler-bear-and-balloon.description: Toddler-age Mo Willems minimal — curious bear cub holding a balloon, big eyes, big white space.
coloring-toddler-bear-and-balloon.subject: a small curious bear cub standing in a sunny meadow holding a round balloon by its string

config.narrative.story_beat: The cub has just received the balloon and is showing it off to the sunshine.

coloring-kids-dragon-meadow.description: Kids-age Eric Carle bold outlines — a friendly dragon in a meadow with butterflies, generous fillable regions.
coloring-kids-dragon-meadow.subject: a friendly rounded dragon sitting in a meadow surrounded by three large butterflies

config.narrative.story_beat: The dragon has gathered a bouquet for a friend who is on the way.

coloring-kids-rabbit-tea-party.description: Kids-age Beatrix Potter naturalistic — two rabbits in waistcoats sharing tea in a cottage garden.
coloring-kids-rabbit-tea-party.subject: two rabbits in waistcoats seated at a small wooden table sharing tea in a cottage garden

config.narrative.story_beat: The older rabbit is telling the younger one a story about the hedgerow.

coloring-preteen-totoro-forest.description: Pre-teen Miyazaki storyboard — a child meeting a gentle giant in an enchanted forest at dusk.
coloring-preteen-totoro-forest.subject: a small child looking up in wonder at a tall gentle forest spirit beside a moss-covered stump

config.narrative.story_beat: The child has just stepped into a clearing and seen the gentle giant for the first time.

_series_aaji_aajoba_texas: 4-page Hanna-Barbera-style series: elderly Marathi couple (Aaji + Aajoba) feeding garden visitors on their Texas backyard patio. Use seeds 21..24 across pages for compositional variation while the character description anchors consistency.

coloring-aaji-aajoba-page1-morning-sparr.description: Page 1 — Morning routine: Aaji carries a steel thali of seed onto the patio while Aajoba waits in the rocking chair; the first house sparrows arrive at the feeder.
coloring-aaji-aajoba-page1-morning-sparr.subject: an elderly Marathi grandfather (Aajoba) seated in a wooden rocking chair on a Texas backyard patio, his elderly wife (Aaji) in a cotton sari with pallu over her shoulder stepping out from a doorway carrying a round steel thali brimming with bird seed, three or four small house sparrows already perched on a hanging tube feeder under a wide-spreading live oak — drawn in Hanna-Barbera flat-cartoon line art (uniform black outlines, white-oval eyes with single-dot pupils, simple curved mouths, closed fillable shapes throughout)

config.narrative.story_beat: Aaji has just stepped onto the patio with the morning seed; Aajoba smiles from the rocking chair; the first sparrows have already noticed.

coloring-aaji-aajoba-page2-songbird-rush.description: Page 2 — Songbird rush: Aaji scattering seed by hand, a busy flock of sparrows and house finches at the feeder and on the patio, Aajoba pointing in delight.
coloring-aaji-aajoba-page2-songbird-rush.subject: the same elderly Marathi couple on their Texas backyard patio — Aaji (silver hair in a low bun, cotton sari with pallu, bindi on forehead, mangalsutra) is scattering bird seed by hand from a steel thali while Aajoba (silver hair, round glasses, cotton kurta) is pointing happily at the chaos — six to eight small songbirds (mostly house sparrows with one or two house finches) are perched on the tube feeder, the patio fence, and the live-oak branches, with a couple more in mid-flight — Hanna-Barbera flat-cartoon line art (uniform outlines, HB-style eyes, closed fillable shapes throughout, no shading)

config.narrative.story_beat: The morning's seed has drawn the whole songbird flock; Aaji laughs softly as Aajoba points out a finch hopping near his shoe.

coloring-aaji-aajoba-page3-blue-jay-visi.description: Page 3 — A Blue Jay arrives: the larger crested jay lands on the feeder while smaller songbirds make room; Aaji and Aajoba look up in surprise-delight.
coloring-aaji-aajoba-page3-blue-jay-visi.subject: the same elderly Marathi couple on the patio — Aaji standing with her steel thali held mid-air, Aajoba half-risen from the rocking chair, both looking up at a Blue Jay that has just landed on the tube feeder with its distinctive head crest raised and black neck-collar visible — two or three sparrows perched on the fence have shuffled to make room, and one house finch is visible in mid-flight at the edge — Hanna-Barbera flat-cartoon line art (uniform outlines, white-oval HB eyes with dot pupils, simple curved mouths, closed fillable regions throughout)

config.narrative.story_beat: A Blue Jay's first visit of the season — Aaji whispers 'look!' as the crested bird settles; the smaller songbirds politely shuffle aside.

coloring-toddler-cow-and-moon.description: Sandra Boynton toddler — a sleepy round cow standing in a field under a big crescent moon. Maximum simplicity; rhyme-book feel.
coloring-toddler-cow-and-moon.subject: a chunky round cow standing in a small grassy field looking up at a big crescent moon in the night sky with a few simple stars

config.narrative.story_beat: The cow has stayed up past bedtime to say goodnight to the moon.

coloring-kids-owl-storytime-branch.description: Mo Willems minimal — a wise owl perched on a branch reading aloud from an open book to a small sparrow and a mouse who lean in to listen.
coloring-kids-owl-storytime-branch.subject: a wise owl perched on a thick branch holding an open storybook in its wings reading aloud; a small sparrow and a tiny mouse are perched beside the owl leaning in to listen

config.narrative.story_beat: The owl has just reached the most exciting page; the sparrow and mouse have stopped fidgeting to listen.

coloring-kids-aaji-roti-kitchen.description: Hanna-Barbera — Aaji rolling roti at the kitchen counter while her young granddaughter stands on a small stool watching. Continues the Aaji-Aajoba series indoors.
coloring-kids-aaji-roti-kitchen.subject: an elderly Marathi grandmother (Aaji) in a cotton sari rolling out a roti on a wooden board at a kitchen counter with a small wooden rolling pin; her young granddaughter aged about 7 stands on a low wooden stool beside her in a simple frock watching closely; a steel tawa and a stack of finished rotis sit on the counter

config.narrative.story_beat: Aaji is teaching her granddaughter the family roti recipe; the girl is paying close attention to the wrist motion.

coloring-kids-fox-kits-blackberries.description: Beatrix Potter — a mother fox in a waistcoat picking blackberries from a hedgerow bush with her two small kits reaching up beside her.
coloring-kids-fox-kits-blackberries.subject: a mother fox in a small waistcoat standing on her hind legs picking blackberries from a tall hedgerow bush; two small fox kits sit beside her on the grass looking up; a wicker basket on the ground holds the berries already picked

config.narrative.story_beat: Late-summer berry-picking; the mother fox passes a single berry down to the smaller kit.

coloring-kids-diwali-diya-lighting.description: Eric Carle bold — two children lighting small clay diya lamps around a simple rangoli pattern on the floor for Diwali night.
coloring-kids-diwali-diya-lighting.subject: two young children (a brother and sister) kneeling on the floor lighting small clay diya oil lamps arranged in a circle around a simple rangoli pattern; the rangoli has flower petals and dots; a small box of matches sits beside them; deep night sky outside the window with a few stars

config.narrative.story_beat: It is Diwali night; the children have been trusted with lighting the diyas for the first time.

coloring-preteen-dragon-over-village.description: Miyazaki storyboard — a friendly long-necked dragon gliding over a small thatched-roof village at dusk; villagers below wave up. Pre-teen complexity.
coloring-preteen-dragon-over-village.subject: a friendly long-necked dragon with soft folded wings gliding low over a small thatched-roof village at dusk; the village has three or four houses with simple square windows and triangular roofs; a winding cobble path runs between them; two or three small villagers in the street are waving up at the dragon; distant rolling hills behind

config.narrative.story_beat: The dragon has just helped the village all afternoon; now it makes its evening farewell flight before disappearing over the hills.

_about_mandala_art: MandalaArtEngine recipes — FLUX-driven subject mandalas for adult coloring. Different from `forge mandala` (which is exact procedural geometry without a subject).
_about_50_coloring_recipes: 50 vetted children's-coloring-book recipes spanning 6 traditions × 3 age tiers × 6 themes (animals · daily-life · seasons · festivals · nature · fantasy). Codified against docs/COLORING_BOOK_SCIENCE.md — every preset honours the age-tier minimum region width, single-narrative-moment cognitive-load rule, and tradition-specific visual language.

coloring-toddler-anml-cat-yarn.description: Boynton toddler — a chunky cat playing with a ball of yarn.
coloring-toddler-anml-cat-yarn.subject: a rounded chunky cartoon cat sitting on the floor batting at a single round ball of yarn, simple closed-shape forms

coloring-toddler-anml-duck-pond.description: Carle toddler — a single duck on a pond with two simple lily pads.
coloring-toddler-anml-duck-pond.subject: a single chunky cartoon duck floating on a small round pond with two large lily-pads beside it, one simple cloud in the sky

coloring-toddler-anml-sheep-meadow.subject: one round fluffy sheep with a small simple face standing in a small grassy meadow with two simple flowers beside it

coloring-toddler-anml-mouse-cheese.subject: a small rounded cartoon mouse sitting up on its haunches holding a simple wedge of cheese with both paws, generous white space around

coloring-toddler-anml-puppy-ball.subject: a rounded chunky puppy with a wagging tail running after a single large round ball on a simple patch of grass

coloring-toddler-anml-elephant-water.subject: one chunky cartoon elephant standing in a small puddle spraying a simple arc of water from its trunk up into the air

coloring-toddler-life-bath-time.subject: a small child sitting in a round bathtub holding one yellow rubber duck above the water, simple bubbles floating around

coloring-toddler-life-bedtime-teddy.subject: a small child lying in a simple bed under a blanket cuddling one teddy bear, a small lamp on a bedside table, big crescent moon visible through a square window

coloring-toddler-natr-flower-bee.subject: one large simple daisy flower with rounded petals standing on a slim stem, one chunky bumblebee hovering beside it

coloring-toddler-natr-fish-bowl.subject: one round chunky cartoon fish swimming inside a simple round fishbowl on a small table, two bubbles rising

coloring-toddler-seas-snowman-scarf.subject: one chunky three-ball snowman with a simple round head wearing a striped scarf and a top hat, two simple stick arms holding nothing, a couple of large snowflakes around

coloring-toddler-fant-frog-prince.subject: one chunky cartoon frog sitting on a large lily-pad wearing a small simple crown on its head

coloring-toddler-fant-bunny-balloon.subject: one small chunky rabbit holding the string of a single large round balloon floating gently above the ground, two simple stars in the sky

coloring-kids-anml-baker-mouse.subject: a mouse wearing a small apron and chef hat standing on a wooden table rolling out dough with a tiny rolling pin; a finished pie cooling beside her; one small finch perched on the windowsill watching

coloring-kids-anml-hedgehog-mushrooms.subject: a small hedgehog with prickly back walking along a forest floor between three large rounded mushrooms; one snail visible on a moss patch; a few simple ferns to the side

coloring-kids-anml-otters-stream.subject: two river otters floating on their backs side by side on a gentle stream holding hands so they do not drift apart; a few reeds at the edge of the water and one small fish visible below the surface

coloring-kids-anml-cat-window.subject: one cat sitting on a windowsill looking through the glass at three small birds on a branch outside; a simple potted plant beside the cat; a wooden floor visible below

coloring-kids-anml-horse-fence.subject: one friendly horse with its head over a wooden plank fence eating an apple from a child's outstretched hand; a barn and a tree in the background; a few wildflowers along the fence

coloring-kids-life-grandfather-garden.subject: an elderly grandfather kneeling beside his young grandchild as both plant a small flower in a garden bed; a small watering can between them; three potted plants nearby waiting to be planted

coloring-kids-seas-autumn-leaves-rake.subject: one child holding a wooden rake gathering fallen autumn leaves into a small pile; one curious squirrel sitting on a nearby tree branch watching; a tree with a few remaining leaves above

coloring-kids-seas-spring-butterflies.subject: one rabbit sitting upright in a spring meadow surrounded by three large butterflies in flight around it; a few simple flowers underfoot and a tree in soft background

coloring-kids-seas-winter-cocoa.subject: one child sitting in a chair holding a steaming round mug of cocoa with both hands, looking out at a frosty windowpane with snow falling outside; a simple striped scarf around their neck

coloring-kids-fest-christmas-tree.description: HB kids — two children decorating a Christmas tree together.
coloring-kids-fest-christmas-tree.subject: two children standing in front of a tall Christmas tree placing simple round ornaments on its branches; a small box of ornaments at their feet; one wrapped present below the tree and a fireplace mantel in the soft background

coloring-kids-fest-eid-crescent-moon.description: HB kids — a family looking up at a crescent moon for Eid.
coloring-kids-fest-eid-crescent-moon.subject: two children standing in a doorway looking up at a thin crescent moon and a single star in the sky; one child pointing upward; simple lanterns hanging from the doorframe above them

coloring-kids-fest-birthday-cake.description: Carle kids — a child blowing out the candles on a layered birthday cake.
coloring-kids-fest-birthday-cake.subject: one child leaning over a tall layered birthday cake with seven simple candle flames; cheeks puffed to blow them out; a streamer and one balloon above; a wrapped gift on the table beside

coloring-kids-natr-tidepool-shells.description: Carle kids — a child crouched at a tidepool examining shells and a starfish.
coloring-kids-natr-tidepool-shells.subject: one child crouched at the edge of a small tidepool with a simple net, looking at one large starfish, two seashells, and a tiny crab visible in the shallow water; pebbles and a small piece of seaweed around the edge

coloring-kids-natr-meadow-picnic.description: Potter kids — two children sharing a picnic basket in a meadow.
coloring-kids-natr-meadow-picnic.subject: two children sitting on a checkered blanket in a sunny meadow with an open picnic basket between them; one child holding an apple, the other a sandwich; a few daisies around the blanket and a single butterfly nearby

coloring-kids-natr-treehouse-friends.description: HB kids — two children in a treehouse waving at a friend below.
coloring-kids-natr-treehouse-friends.subject: two children sitting on the wooden platform of a tree-house in a tall oak tree waving down to a third child climbing the rope-ladder; a small flag flying from the treehouse roof; leaves around the platform

coloring-kids-fant-pirate-treasure.description: HB kids — a young pirate finding a treasure chest on the beach.
coloring-kids-fant-pirate-treasure.subject: one young child dressed as a simple pirate with a hat and eyepatch kneeling beside an open treasure chest on a sandy beach; a few large gold coins spilling out; a wooden ship visible far in the water

coloring-kids-fant-castle-knight.description: HB kids — a young knight with a wooden sword in front of a stone castle.
coloring-kids-fant-castle-knight.subject: one young child dressed as a knight with a simple helmet and wooden sword standing proudly in front of a small stone castle gate; a friendly dragon peeking out from the castle window; a small banner waving above the gate

coloring-kids-fant-wizard-apprentice.description: Miyazaki kids — a young apprentice and a wise wizard cat looking at a glowing book.
coloring-kids-fant-wizard-apprentice.subject: one young child sitting beside a wise cat wearing a tiny wizard hat both peering at an open book on a wooden table; a small lantern glowing beside them; shelves of jars and books in the soft background

coloring-pretn-natr-rainforest-canopy.description: Miyazaki pre-teen — a child exploring a rainforest canopy with a friendly monkey companion.
coloring-pretn-natr-rainforest-canopy.subject: one child crossing a rope bridge high in a rainforest canopy with a friendly small monkey leading the way; large hanging vines and broad leaves around them; one toucan perched on a branch; sun rays angled through the foliage

coloring-pretn-natr-tidepool-creatures.description: Miyazaki pre-teen — a dense tidepool scene with many small creatures.
coloring-pretn-natr-tidepool-creatures.subject: a detailed tidepool with a starfish a sea anemone two small crabs three different seashells a tiny octopus peeking out from a rock and one small fish; pebbles and seaweed strands carefully drawn; ripples on the water surface

coloring-pretn-fant-dragon-mountain.description: Miyazaki pre-teen — a friendly dragon perched on a mountain peak watching the sunrise.
coloring-pretn-fant-dragon-mountain.subject: a friendly long-necked dragon with folded soft wings perched on a high mountain peak watching a rising sun; rolling clouds below; one small lantern hanging from its claws; rocky details on the peak and a single pine tree

coloring-pretn-fant-witch-cottage.description: Miyazaki pre-teen — a young witch and her cat in a cluttered cottage interior.
coloring-pretn-fant-witch-cottage.subject: one young witch in a simple cloak and pointed hat stirring a small pot at a wooden stove inside a cottage; her black cat sitting on a stack of books beside her; shelves of jars potion bottles and a broomstick leaning against the wall; one window showing stars outside

coloring-pretn-fest-diwali-rangoli-aaji.description: Miyazaki pre-teen — Aaji and her grandchild creating a detailed rangoli pattern with diyas.
coloring-pretn-fest-diwali-rangoli-aaji.subject: an elderly Marathi grandmother kneeling on the floor with her young grandchild together placing rangoli petals around a circular pattern; a ring of lit clay diya lamps surrounding the rangoli; intricate floor pattern detail; stars visible through the doorway

coloring-pretn-natr-coral-reef.description: Miyazaki pre-teen — a snorkeler exploring a coral reef with many fish and sea creatures.
coloring-pretn-natr-coral-reef.subject: one child snorkeler with mask and fins underwater surrounded by a dense coral reef; six different fish a sea turtle one octopus one starfish and waving sea fans; bubbles rising; sunlight rays from above

coloring-pretn-fant-spirit-bridge.description: Miyazaki pre-teen — a child crossing an old wooden bridge with two small forest spirits accompanying.
coloring-pretn-fant-spirit-bridge.subject: one child walking across an old curved wooden bridge over a stream with two small rounded forest spirits floating beside them; tall trees on both banks; lanterns hanging from the bridge posts; one fish jumping in the stream below

coloring-pretn-anml-owl-library.description: Miyazaki pre-teen — a wise owl in a library of tall bookshelves reading to small mice.
coloring-pretn-anml-owl-library.subject: one wise owl perched on a tall stack of books holding an open volume reading aloud to three small mice seated on a wooden table; rows of tall bookshelves in the background; one candle in a holder; a quill and inkwell on the table

mandala-whale-zentangle.description: An elegant ornamental whale: head + dorsal + tail carry zentangle patterns; belly stays mostly white as breathing space; eye is clean and ancient. Follows the 60/30/10 ornamental design primer.
mandala-whale-zentangle.subject: a humpback whale in side profile swimming gracefully — its HEAD and FOREHEAD carry hero-detail zentangle patterns (the dense focal zone); its UPPER FLANK and DORSAL area carry medium-detail flowing ribbons and scale-motifs that follow the body curves; its BELLY and LOWER UNDERSIDE are MOSTLY WHITE breathing space (only one or two sparse flowing flow-lines suggest belly grooves); its TAIL FIN and PECTORAL FIN carry hero ornamental detail at the tips; one clean readable eye on the head with NO patterns crowding it; the surrounding canvas is white paper

mandala-lion-head-zentangle.description: A noble lion's head facing forward, mane composed of intricate radial zentangle patterns. Strong front-facing portrait.
mandala-lion-head-zentangle.subject: a noble lion head facing the viewer with a full radiating mane

mandala-lotus-sacred-geometry.description: A lotus flower at the exact center; concentric sacred-geometry rings build outward (Flower-of-Life + Sri-Yantra cues). 12-fold rotational.
mandala-lotus-sacred-geometry.subject: a fully-opened lotus flower seen from directly above

mandala-tree-of-life-art-nouveau.description: A Tree of Life — roots form the central mandala, branches form the outer rings; Mucha + Klimt influence. Subject and mandala are one organic whole.
mandala-tree-of-life-art-nouveau.subject: a Tree of Life with deep symmetrical roots below and a spreading canopy of branches above

mandala-peacock-henna.description: A peacock with its tail fanned full circle — body at center, tail-feather eyes as the rotational motif. Henna-mehndi vocabulary; bridal-grade density.
mandala-peacock-henna.subject: a peacock with its tail feathers fanned in a full radial circle around its body

mandala-owl-madhubani.description: A wise owl facing forward, body and wings filled with Madhubani folk patterns (double-line borders, geometric and floral fills). Mithila tradition.
mandala-owl-madhubani.subject: a wise owl facing forward with wings spread slightly

mandala-butterfly-kaleidoscope.description: Six butterflies arranged in a radial kaleidoscope; each butterfly is a tile of the mandala. Subject-as-motif.
mandala-butterfly-kaleidoscope.subject: a single butterfly motif (the same butterfly will be tiled radially around the center)

coloring-aaji-aajoba-page4-rabbit-and-ki.description: Page 4 — A cottontail mother and her baby kit appear at the edge of the patio; Aaji crouches with a piece of carrot, Aajoba pointing in wonder. The closing page of the series.
coloring-aaji-aajoba-page4-rabbit-and-ki.subject: the same elderly Marathi couple on the Texas backyard patio in late golden-hour light — Aaji is crouched low on her chappals (sari hem gathered) holding out a small piece of carrot, Aajoba half-leaning from the rocking chair pointing in delighted surprise — at the edge of the patio sits an Eastern Cottontail rabbit (long upright ears, large hind legs, cotton-puff tail) with a noticeably smaller baby kit beside her (shorter ears, smaller body), both looking attentively at the offered carrot — two small house sparrows still on the fence in the background — Hanna-Barbera flat-cartoon line art (uniform outlines, HB-style white-oval eyes with dot pupils, simple curved mouths, fully closed fillable shapes — NO predatory teeth, NO cartoon clothing on the rabbits)

config.narrative.story_beat: A surprise late-afternoon visitor — Aaji freezes mid-crouch with her offering; Aajoba points as the cottontail mother and kit hesitate at the edge of the patio.

_about_minimalist_tshirt: MinimalistTShirtEngine recipes — screen-printable apparel graphics. Use print-art mode for production artwork; shirt-mockup mode for previewing placement on a blank tee. Exact typography should be added later by Forge/PIL/vector tooling, not generated by FLUX.

tshirt-mountain-one-line.description: One-line mountain and sun mark for a calm outdoor shirt. Production art, no mockup.
tshirt-mountain-one-line.subject: a single continuous line drawing of a mountain ridge with a small rising sun tucked into the valley

tshirt-chai-club-pocket.description: Tiny left-pocket chai cup steam icon with blank caption zone for later exact text.
tshirt-chai-club-pocket.subject: a tiny ceramic chai cup seen from the side, three simple steam lines rising above it

tshirt-tiger-negative-space.description: Geometric tiger head where the stripes are negative-space cutouts. Two-ink earth palette.
tshirt-tiger-negative-space.subject: a calm tiger head facing forward, stripes made from negative space cutouts, no realistic fur detail

tshirt-lotus-tonal-badge.description: Tonal lotus badge for a premium quiet shirt. No generated text.
tshirt-lotus-tonal-badge.subject: a simple lotus flower built from seven symmetrical petal shapes inside a very thin circle

tshirt-popti-parrot-madhubani.description: Premium modern Madhubani-inspired popti green parrot shirt art: black keylines, deep red micro accents, ivory/cream base, print-art mode.
tshirt-popti-parrot-madhubani.subject: single centered popti green parrot in side profile, elegant curved beak, almond eye, clean black ink double-contour outlines, subtle Madhubani-inspired feather line detailing, deep red beak and tiny floral accents, ivory negative space, ultra-clean silhouette, no scenery

tshirt-royal-bengal-tiger-madhubani.description: Royal Bengal tiger corrected for the Indian animal Madhubani T-shirt set: full-body side profile, matte folk palette, no mascot-logo head drift.
tshirt-royal-bengal-tiger-madhubani.subject: single centered Royal Bengal tiger in complete full-body side profile for a premium Madhubani T-shirt print, walking calmly left to right, clear tiger silhouette with strong shoulders, long tail, four proportional legs, almond eye, whisker dots, bold black double-contour keylines, matte flat saturated folk fills, striped body panels filled with leaf-vein and fish-scale Madhubani infill, tiny peepal leaf and lotus ornaments used sparingly, large clean negative space, no text, no scenery, isolated print artwork, screen-print friendly, modern Indian streetwear
